docs.title: Legal Peripherals MCP
docs.text: Welcome to the documentation for the Legal Peripherals MCP Server. This server facilitates automation of essential legal and corporate workflow actions, including: - Secretary of State (SOS) Crawlers: Automated business registration checks across all 50 states. - EIN & Form SS-4 filing: Automatic PDF drafting and filing scheduling to respect IRS business hours. - Statute Catalog & Templates: Programmatic lookup of corporate/LLC statutes and document drafting templates.

docs.title: Project-Specific Concepts
docs.text: Concept ID Name Description CONCEPT:LEGAL-001 Secretary of State Crawlers Dynamic business entity lookup & verifications across 50 states CONCEPT:LEGAL-002 IRS EIN & Off-Hours Filing SS-4 PDF drafting and scheduling compliance operations CONCEPT:LEGAL-003 Statutes & Charter Templates LLC/corporate filing guidelines and dynamic template lookups

docs.title: Architectural Overview
docs.text:
The Legal Peripherals MCP package leverages FastMCP to expose three core domains to LLM agents:

  1. Secretary of State (SOS) Crawlers:
  2. Uses Playwright to query state business registry pages dynamically.
  3. Provides pre-configured crawling pipelines for TX, DE, NV, and WY.

  4. Gracefully falls back to simulated/mocked search structures for all 50 states to guarantee 100% state coverage.

  5. EIN (Form SS-4) & Scheduling:

  6. Drafts the IRS Form SS-4 fields as structured outputs.
  7. Automatically detects current IRS working hours (Mon-Fri, 7am - 10pm EST).

  8. Schedules/queues submissions during off-hours, providing tracking IDs.

  9. Statute Catalog:

  10. Contains precise corporate / LLC statutes across all 50 US states.
  11. Maps standard organizational charter templates for drafting company filings.
